$comment: Saga-style workflow template — every step names its compensation or is marked irreversible (which raises its ⑦ risk tier). State is checkpointed by the engine, not held in agent context.

steps.action: compute refund amount, write recommendation to memory L1
steps.compensation: supersede the L1 node (③ supersedes field) — history preserved

steps.gate: ⑦ risk gate on billing.issue_refund — expected: human_ratify (irreversible, external)

steps.compensation: NONE — forward-only; errors are corrected by a new transaction, never a silent reversal

steps.note: draft by agent, send passes the same ⑦ gate

invariants: exactly one owner at every moment: an agent, a human approval queue, or an escalation target
every step emits a provenance record; the workflow id ties them into one auditable chain
